about.heroSubtitle: We build free, no-fuss tools that help freelancers worldwide work smarter — without subscriptions, watermarks, or logins.
about.missionP1: Freelancing should be simple. But managing the business side — creating invoices, writing contracts, issuing receipts — often isn't. Most tools either charge a monthly fee or slap a watermark on your documents unless you upgrade.
about.missionP2: We built FreelanceKit to change that. Everything here is 100% free, forever. No account required. No watermarks. No download limits. Just professional documents, instantly.
about.privacyP1: FreelanceKit runs entirely in your browser. We don't have a backend server or database. When you fill out an invoice or contract, that data never leaves your device — it's never sent anywhere. Your PDF is generated locally and downloaded directly to your computer.
about.privacyP2Before: We care deeply about your privacy. Read our
about.langsSubtitle: FreelanceKit is built for freelancers around the world.
about.ctaSubtitle: Create your first professional document in under a minute — for free.
about.val1Desc: No trials. No paywalls. Every feature, every download, every time — completely free.
about.val2Desc: Your data never leaves your browser. We have no servers, no databases, no tracking of your documents.
about.val3Desc: Fill in your details and download a professional PDF in seconds. No learning curve.
about.tool1Desc: Create professional invoices with your logo, line items, tax, discount, and digital signature. Download as PDF instantly.
about.tool2Desc: Send polished project quotes to clients before work begins. Same professional format as your invoices.
about.tool3Desc: Issue payment receipts to clients after a transaction. Simple, clean, and professional.
about.tool4Desc: Generate freelance contracts for general work, web development, design, or writing — with legal-friendly templates.
about.step1Desc: Enter your info, client info, items, and any custom settings.
about.step2Desc: Choose a template, pick your brand color, and upload your logo.
about.step3Desc: Click the download button. Your PDF is generated instantly — no signup needed.

footer.tagline: Free tools for freelancers worldwide. No login. No watermarks.
